nodes.name: 喀麦隆

nodes.name: Black-collared lovebird
nodes.summary: Black-collared lovebird（Black-collared lovebird，学名 Agapornis swindernianus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-collared lovebird is distributed across a wide range in African tropical closed rainforest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the forests of Cameroon, Central African Republic, the Republic of Congo, the Democratic Republic of Congo, Côte d'Ivoire, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Ghana, Liberia and Uganda. They hide high in the forest canopy and are characterized as being very shy.The black-collared lovebird lives mainly in mature and secondary subtropic lowlands
